summary: AI/ML Engineer and BTech Computer Science undergraduate specializing in architecting Generative AI applications and MLOps pipelines to solve complex business challenges. Developed production-ready RAG systems using LangChain and PyTorch, achieving a 95% match rate for automated tasks. Leverages expertise in Large Language Models and Python to deliver scalable autonomous systems, resulting in a 90% reduction in manual operational workflows for various enterprise-level projects.

bullet_points: Design and develop end-to-end AI and Machine Learning solutions including predictive models, NLP systems, computer vision applications, and Generative AI workflows.
Build Agentic AI systems using LLMs, LangGraph, LangChain, RAG architectures, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) for autonomous task execution and decision-making.
Develop scalable backend services and MLOps pipelines using Python, FastAPI, Docker, cloud platforms, and modern deployment practices.
Developed OrderEasy Analytics platform for order processing and delivery tracking, reducing manual operational errors by 90% across workflows.
Built customer intelligence dashboards incorporating RFM, CLV, and sales analytics, improving customer retention by 20% through targeted insights.
Engineered cloud-based document management and automated reporting systems, reducing document retrieval time by 40% and improving operational efficiency.

projects.name: Email Automator & AI Sales Agent
bullet_points: Orchestrated a stateful agentic pipeline using LangGraph to automate email fetching and reply generation, eliminating 100% of manual triage effort.
Provisioned a serverless CI/CD automation workflow via GitHub Actions with 15-minute cron schedules for zero-cost operation across two live domains.
Scaled the system to handle dual-site inquiry volumes by architecting modular MLOps nodes with isolated processing stages for professional B2B routing.
Grounded LLM responses by constructing structured Markdown knowledge bases, maintaining 100% reply accuracy across distinct product, pricing, and project domains.

projects.name: TailoredResume.ai
bullet_points: Architected an agentic AI pipeline using FastAPI and Google Gemini to automate context-aware resume tailoring, achieving 85% ATS match scores.
Engineered a high-fidelity PDF generation engine for Generative AI applications using ReportLab while enforcing strict layout constraints to reduce formatting.
Calibrated a custom NLP scoring engine to ensure 90% keyword coverage for must-have skills through multi-tier keyword absorption layer integration.
Integrated a fallback architecture with Large Language Models to ensure 99.9% system availability during high-volume processing of various user resumes.

projects.name: OrderEazy Analytics
bullet_points: Boosted monthly revenue by 35% through implementation of RFM segmentation and time-series forecasting models within a full-stack business intelligence platform.
Synthesized complex metrics into actionable insights using Gemini Pro, cutting executive reporting time by 70% for improved operational decision making.
Migrated legacy spreadsheets to a unified Supabase architecture, reducing data retrieval time from minutes to milliseconds for 100% of records.
Accelerated application engagement by 40% using optimized asynchronous API handling and Framer Motion interactions within a high-performance React dashboard environment.

education.degree: BTech Computer Science Engineering - Artificial Intelligence

certifications: Generative AI for Business — IIM Mumbai
